The '''''Dauntless''-class heavy cruiser''' was the second largest [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] that saw service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|fleet]] during the course of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Xg-1Attack-RECG.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A squadron of [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|''Alpha''-class Xg-1 Star Wings]] attacks a ''Dauntless''-class heavy cruiser.]]
The class featured a formidable array of weapons, heavy [[Armor/Legends|plating]], and strong [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]]. It also featured an excellent [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] package and countermeasures system.<ref name="SWRvg" />

==History==
The [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] was originally built as a luxury [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] but was converted into a [[Warship/Legends|combat ship]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> The ''Dauntless-''class served on the front line of many [[Realspace/Legends|space]] battles during the course of the Galactic Civil War and even into the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="NJOSB" />

The [[Endor (Dauntless-class)|''Endor'']] was a ''Dauntless''-class cruiser that served with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], and was [[Ambush at RZ7-6113-23|destroyed]] in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].<ref name="CE3-1">[[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 1|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 1]]</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{1st}}
